calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Cotrustee Of A Trust
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerald Woods for and with James Ahlquist. David Ahlquist (Conservator for Alfred) also present.

Mr. Woods stated that no one has heard form Robert Ahlquist. The Court stated that there are no objections, that there is no appearance by Robert and that it is appropriate to remove him as Co-Trustee. David Ahlquist expressed his wish to have these extra expenses charged to Robert's share (matter not before the Court). The Court granted the Petition to Remove Co-Trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Remove Cotrustee Of A Trust
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Continued To Sep-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
